paragraphs: ONC Certification|ClientConnect
1-844-463-3482|info@meditab.com|ONC Certification|ClientConnect
Give Your Practice Workflow a Facelift
Discover the beauty of efficiency with an all-in-one cosmetic EHR, practice management, billing, and office management solution, built for cosmetic practices like yours.

Manage your patients, practice, marketing, and revenue in one place. From converting new patients and tracking your inventory to managing your medical office, you’ll find everything you need to maximize revenue and grow your practice with CosmetiSuite.

CosmetiSuite combines more than 20 years of EHR software innovation into a platform for your entire practice. Alongside industry-leading practice management, office management, and billing software, it provides your practice with an EHR system that not only supports the needs of the cosmetic specialty, but is also fully customizable, adapting to your individual practice.
CosmetiSuite allows for full integration with Meditab’s Intelligent Medical Software (IMS) family of mobile apps, online portals, and more.
Explore the fully-integrated, specialty-specific features designed to streamline your practice workflow, increase patient retention, and improve your bottom line.
Explore the fully-integrated, specialty-specific features designed to streamline your practice workflow, increase patient retention, and improve your bottom line.
Surgical Quoting System
Create quotes for elective surgeries from pre-defined templates, and bill procedures directly from the quote. Link all payments made and monitor the remaining balance from the quote screen.
Point of Sale & Inventory Management

Post invoice charges and payments to the patient’s ledger while automatically tracking inventory and maintaining an accurate product count. Never fall short on inventory again thanks to re-order reminders.

Integrated Marketing ToolsKeep prospective patients, marketing expenses, referral sources, and conversion rates in one place. Easily pull up reports to track the effectiveness of yourmarketing campaigns.
Engage and communicate with your patients and prospects throughout their journey with automated messages and processes.
Photo ManagementSecurely capture, import, and save patient photos. Manage, mark, and add details on the photo with built-in editing functionality.
E-Prescribing for Controlled Substances
Track and manage prescriptions with better efficiency with the integrated e-prescription and EPCS features.
Reporting & AnalyticsGet a clear picture of your practice’s marketing campaigns, product sales, operations, and revenue. Make informed business decisions and identify opportunities for improvement.
Insurance BillingMaximize your revenue potential and never leave a single dollar on the table with a hassle-free, automated billing process
FaxCloud allows you to trade the hassles of traditional fax machines for a more efficient, HIPAA-compliant eFaxing solution.
Joy Williams, Practice Manager, Peak Rejuvenation
Joy Williams, Practice Manager, Peak Rejuvenation
Joy Williams, Practice Manager, Peak Rejuvenation
Are You Ready to Increase Your Revenue and See More Patients?
Email:info@meditab.com
Address:8795 Folsom Blvd., Suite 205, Sacramento, CA 95826
Meditab is an EMR software company and practice management system. We offer leading multispecialty EHR solutions designed for providers to meet the unique needs of their practices.
Meditab | All Rights Reserved.

The Website use cookies to improve user experience, analyze traffic
            and performance and to assist marketing campaign to deliver
            personalized content. You can either select ‘Accept All' or
            customize your preferences by clicking on‘Cookie Settings'.

When you visit our Website, we use cookies to collect
                information about your device, preferences, and browsing
                behavior. These cookies help us enhance your experience by
                ensuring the Website functions properly, personalizing content,
                and supporting our marketing efforts. You have the option to
                manage your cookie preferences, though disabling certain types
                may affect your experience and the services we provide. To learn
                more or adjust your settings, explore the different cookie
                categories. However, Strictly Necessary Cookies cannot be
                disabled, as they are essential for core Website functions, such
                as displaying the cookie banner, remembering your settings, and
                managing login sessions. For more information, please see ourPrivacy Policy.

These cookies are essential for the Website to function
                        and cannot be disabled. They are typically set in
                        response to actions you take, such as adjusting privacy
                        settings, secure log in, or filling out forms. While you
                        can configure your browser to block these cookies, doing
                        so may prevent parts of the Website from working
                        properly. These cookies do not store any personally
                        identifiable information.

If you are a California resident, you have the right to
                        opt out of the sale or sharing of your personal
                        information at any time. This applies across our
                        platforms, services, businesses, and devices. To
                        exercise this right, simply use the toggle switch below.

Residents of Virginia, Utah, Colorado, and Connecticut
                        also have the right to opt out of the sale of their
                        personal data, as well as the use of their data for
                        targeted advertising. You can manage these preferences
                        using the toggle switch below.

These cookies help us track visits and traffic sources,
                        enabling us to measure and enhance our Website's
                        performance. They provide insights into the most and
                        least popular pages and how visitors navigate the
                        Website. The data collected is aggregated and anonymous.
                        If you choose to disable these cookies, we won't be able
                        to track your visits or analyze Website traffic
                        effectively.
